reasoning: The control CC6.7 focuses on restricting and protecting information during transmission, movement, or removal. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring secure network communication and data protection. NetworkPolicies can enforce ingress and egress restrictions to ensure only authorized communication occurs. Enabling TLS on Ingress ensures data is encrypted during transmission. Encrypting etcd ensures data at rest is protected, which indirectly supports secure movement and removal of information.
title: CC6.7 The entity restricts the transmission, movement, and removal of information to authorized internal and external users and processes, and protects it during transmission, movement, or removal to meet the entity’s objectives
